metadata.name: pyonix
metadata.summary: A Python client library for the Ionix API

modules.name: pyonix.endpoints.connections
documentation: ionix_api/endpoints/connections.py

classes.name: pyonix.endpoints.connections.Connections

methods.name: pyonix.endpoints.connections.Connections.get_all
documentation:
Get all connections synchronously (handles pagination automatically).

Args:
    asset: Filter by asset name
    limit: Number of results per page
    offset: Pagination offset
    **kwargs: Additional filter parameters
    
Returns:
    List of all connections across pages
    
Raises:
    IonixClientError: For 4xx errors
    IonixServerError: For 5xx errors

methods.name: pyonix.endpoints.connections.Connections.get_all_async
documentation:
Get all connections asynchronously (handles pagination automatically).

Args:
    asset: Filter by asset name
    limit: Number of results per page
    offset: Pagination offset
    **kwargs: Additional filter parameters
    
Returns:
    List of all connections across pages
    
Raises:
    IonixClientError: For 4xx errors
    IonixServerError: For 5xx errors

methods.name: pyonix.endpoints.connections.Connections.get
documentation:
Get paginated connections synchronously.

Args:
    asset: Filter by asset name
    limit: Number of results per page
    offset: Pagination offset
    **kwargs: Additional filter parameters
    
Returns:
    Paginated response containing connections
    
Raises:
    IonixClientError: For 4xx errors
    IonixServerError: For 5xx errors

methods.name: pyonix.endpoints.connections.Connections.get_async
documentation:
Get paginated connections asynchronously.

Args:
    asset: Filter by asset name
    limit: Number of results per page
    offset: Pagination offset
    **kwargs: Additional filter parameters
    
Returns:
    Paginated response containing connections
    
Raises:
    IonixClientError: For 4xx errors
    IonixServerError: For 5xx errors
Handles interaction with the Ionix Connections API endpoints.

modules.name: pyonix.client
documentation: ionix_api/client.py

classes.name: pyonix.client.IonixApiError
documentation: Base exception for Ionix API errors

classes.name: pyonix.client.IonixClientError
documentation: 4xx client errors

classes.name: pyonix.client.IonixServerError
documentation: 5xx server errors

methods.name: pyonix.client.IonixClient.__init__
documentation:
Initialize Ionix API client.

Args:
    base_url: API base URL
    api_token: API authentication token
    account_name: Account name for X-Account-Name header
    timeout: Request timeout in seconds
    max_retries: Maximum number of retry attempts
    batch_size: Number of concurrent requests for pagination

methods.name: pyonix.client.IonixClient._clean_params
documentation: Clean None values from params dict

methods.name: pyonix.client.IonixClient._get_async_session
documentation: Get or create async session

methods.name: pyonix.client.IonixClient._handle_response
documentation:
Handle API response and errors.

Args:
    response: Response from API request
    
Returns:
    Response JSON data
    
Raises:
    IonixClientError: For 4xx errors
    IonixServerError: For 5xx errors

methods.name: pyonix.client.IonixClient._handle_async_response
documentation:
Handle async API response and errors.

Args:
    response: Async response from API request
    
Returns:
    Response JSON data
    
Raises:
    IonixClientError: For 4xx errors
    IonixServerError: For 5xx errors

methods.name: pyonix.client.IonixClient.get
documentation:
Make synchronous GET request to API endpoint.

Args:
    endpoint: API endpoint path or full URL
    params: Optional query parameters
    
Returns:
    Response JSON data

methods.name: pyonix.client.IonixClient.get_async
documentation:
Make asynchronous GET request to API endpoint.

Args:
    endpoint: API endpoint path or full URL
    params: Optional query parameters
    
Returns:
    Response JSON data

methods.name: pyonix.client.IonixClient._fetch_page
documentation:
Fetch a single page of results.

Returns:
    Tuple of (results, next_url)

methods.name: pyonix.client.IonixClient.paginate_async
documentation:
Handle paginated results from API asynchronously with concurrent page fetching.

Args:
    endpoint: API endpoint path
    params: Optional query parameters
    
Returns:
    List of all results across pages

methods.name: pyonix.client.IonixClient.post
documentation:
Make synchronous POST request to API endpoint.

Args:
    endpoint: API endpoint path
    data: Request body data
    
Returns:
    Response JSON data

methods.name: pyonix.client.IonixClient.post_async
documentation:
Make asynchronous POST request to API endpoint.

Args:
    endpoint: API endpoint path
    data: Request body data
    
Returns:
    Response JSON data

methods.name: pyonix.client.IonixClient.paginate
documentation:
Handle paginated results from API synchronously.

Args:
    endpoint: API endpoint path
    params: Optional query parameters
    
Returns:
    List of all results across pages

methods.name: pyonix.client.IonixClient.close
documentation: Close async session

methods.name: pyonix.endpoints.action_items.ActionItems.get
documentation:
Get open action items synchronously.

Args:
    asset: Filter by asset name
    limit: Number of results per page
    offset: Pagination offset
    **kwargs: Additional filter parameters
    
Returns:
    PaginatedResponse containing action items
    
Raises:
    IonixClientError: For 4xx errors
    IonixServerError: For 5xx errors

documentation:
Get open action items asynchronously.

    limit: Number of results per page

    **kwargs: Additional filter parameters

Raises:

    IonixServerError: For 5xx errors

methods.name: pyonix.endpoints.action_items.ActionItems.acknowledge
documentation:
Acknowledge or unacknowledge action items synchronously.

Args:
    ids: List of action item IDs
    is_acknowledged: True to acknowledge, False to unacknowledge
    reason: Optional acknowledgement reason
    
Returns:
    API response
    
Raises:
    IonixClientError: For 4xx errors
    IonixServerError: For 5xx errors

methods.name: pyonix.endpoints.action_items.ActionItems.acknowledge_async
documentation:
Acknowledge or unacknowledge action items asynchronously.

Args:
    ids: List of action item IDs
    is_acknowledged: True to acknowledge, False to unacknowledge
    reason: Optional acknowledgement reason
    
Returns:
    API response
    
Raises:
    IonixClientError: For 4xx errors
    IonixServerError: For 5xx errors
Handles interaction with the Ionix Action Items API endpoints.
